scripts.go:build: find ./services -name go.mod -exec dirname {} \; | xargs -I {} sh -c 'cd {} && go test -c -o /dev/null ./...'
scripts.go:test: find ./services -name go.mod -exec dirname {} \; | xargs -I {} sh -c 'cd {} && go test -short ./...'
scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d db redis clickhouse qdrant nats
